title: Mirissa Beach & Whale Watching
shortDescription: Spot blue whales at dawn and unwind on the golden palm-lined beaches of Sri Lanka's south.
description: Experience the warm Indian Ocean on Sri Lanka's stunning south coast. Set sail at sunrise to spot the world's largest creatures – blue whales and pods of spinner dolphins – then spend lazy afternoons swinging in coconut palms at Coconut Tree Hill, surfing in Weligama, and dining on fresh seafood by the waves.

itinerary.details: Drive to Mirissa, sunset at Coconut Tree Hill, beachfront dinner (own cost).
Early morning whale watching cruise, free beach time, return transfer.
